Record Class SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
Enclosing interface:
SshClientAPI
public static record SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig(String privateKeyPath, String passphrase, boolean strictHostKeyChecking, int timeoutSeconds, io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig.AuthMethod authMethod) extends Record
Infrastructure-layer configuration for establishing an SSH connection.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • SshConnectionConfig

      public SshConnectionConfig(String privateKeyPath, String passphrase, boolean strictHostKeyChecking, int timeoutSeconds, io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig.AuthMethod authMethod)
      Creates an instance of a SshConnectionConfig record class.
      Parameters:
      privateKeyPath - the value for the privateKeyPath record component
      passphrase - the value for the passphrase record component
      strictHostKeyChecking - the value for the strictHostKeyChecking record component
      timeoutSeconds - the value for the timeoutSeconds record component
      authMethod - the value for the authMethod record component

  • Method Details

    • defaults

      public static SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig defaults()
      Auto-detects the best available SSH key on the current machine. Preference order: id_ed25519 → id_ecdsa → id_rsa If none exist, generates a new ED25519 key pair via ssh-keygen.

    • defaultsEd25519

      public static SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig defaultsEd25519()
      ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 — explicit ED25519, no auto-detection.

    • withKey

      public static SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig withKey(String privateKeyPath)
      Specific key file, no passphrase.

    • withKey

      public static SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig withKey(String privateKeyPath, String passphrase)
      Specific key file with passphrase.

    • withPassword

      public static SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig withPassword(String password)
      Plain user password — no key file required.

    • withStrictHostChecking

      public SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig withStrictHostChecking()
      Returns a copy with strict host key checking enabled.

    • withTimeout

      public SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig withTimeout(int seconds)
      Returns a copy with a different timeout.

    • hasPassphrase

      public boolean hasPassphrase()

    • timeout

      public Duration timeout()

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
